# Urban Sparkle Cleaners
> Professional residential and commercial cleaning services in Burlington, Oakville, Hamilton, and the Niagara Region of Ontario, Canada.

## About
Urban Sparkle Cleaners is a fully insured and bonded cleaning company serving Southern Ontario. We use eco-friendly, plant-based products safe for families, children, and pets. We offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee — if you're not happy, we'll return and re-clean at no charge.

**Phone:** (647) 460-7008
**Email:** urbansparklecleaners@gmail.com
**Website:** https://urbansparklecleaners.ca

## Services
- Regular Cleaning — Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly home cleaning starting at $30/hr ($90 minimum)
- Deep Cleaning — Top-to-bottom intensive cleaning from $40/hr (minimum 2 cleaners)
- Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning — Comprehensive cleaning for vacant properties
- Post-Renovation Cleaning — Construction dust and debris removal
- Airbnb Cleaning — Quick turnaround for short-term rental hosts
- Event Cleaning — Pre and post-event cleaning for venues
- Senior Cleaning — Gentle, respectful cleaning for seniors
- Condo Cleaning — Specialized cleaning for condos and apartments
- Office Cleaning — Professional commercial office cleaning
- Janitorial Services — Ongoing janitorial services for facilities

## Pricing
- Regular cleaning: $30/hour ($90 minimum for apartments)
- Deep cleaning: $40/hour (minimum 2 cleaners required)
- Recurring discounts: 15% off weekly, 10% off bi-weekly, 5% off monthly
- Add-ons: Appliance cleaning ($30), inside windows ($30), laundry wash & fold ($25), inside fridge ($25), inside oven ($25), garage sweep ($20)

## Service Areas — Southern Ontario
Burlington, Oakville, Hamilton, Grimsby, Stoney Creek, Ancaster, Waterdown, Niagara Falls, Niagara-on-the-Lake, St. Catharines, Welland, Thorold, Fort Erie, Fonthill, Pelham, Lincoln, Port Colborne

## Business Details
- **Type:** Local business — Cleaning Services
- **Province:** Ontario, Canada
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Saturday 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM (Sunday closed; evening/weekend appointments available by request)
- **Insurance:** Fully insured and bonded
- **Products:** Eco-friendly, plant-based cleaning supplies provided by us
- **Payment:** Cash, Interac e-transfer, credit card (payment due after service)
- **Cancellation:** 24 hours notice required
- **Booking:** Online at https://urbansparklecleaners.ca/book or call (647) 460-7008
- **Rating:** 4.9/5 stars
